message:
feat(core): bind approval tokens to plan hashes at issuance and validate at consumption

Introduce consume_for_plan_with_context() to atomically validate plan
hashes and record audit context on approval grant, preventing TOCTOU
attacks where a plan changes between approval issuance and consumption.
Move plan construction before authorization so the hash is available
at token issuance time in send-text and run-extension command paths.

Also fix event stream rule_id filter to unconditionally reject
non-detection events when rule IDs are specified, closing a path where
PaneDiscovered events could pass through a rule-filtered subscription.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
